props.children: This page demonstrates anchor link functionality with a sidebar navigation. Click the links in the sidebar to jump to different sections.

This is the Overview section. It contains information about the anchor link testing process and methodology. We verify that clicking sidebar links correctly scrolls to this section and updates the URL hash to #overview.

This is the Features section. Here we list all the features being tested for anchor link functionality. The browser test verifies that clicking the Features link in the sidebar scrolls to this section and updates the URL hash to #features.

Key features being tested include: sidebar navigation with anchor links, hash-based URL routing, smooth scrolling behavior, URL hash updates after navigation, and DOM element targeting with proper IDs. Each feature is validated using real browser automation with Playwright and Chromium.

This is the Pricing section. It demonstrates anchor navigation to the bottom section of the page. We verify that clicking the Pricing link in the sidebar correctly scrolls to this section and updates the URL hash to #pricing.

The browser automation test takes full-page screenshots before and after each anchor link click, providing visual proof that the navigation is working correctly. All screenshots are timestamped and saved to the verification directory for review.
